name: live-voice-preflight-fragment
description: Reusable fragment: verify the live voice and meeting runtime surfaces are present before a live voice flow.

context.preflight_cmd: pnpm service:preflight -- --service voice && pnpm service:preflight -- --service meeting && case "${OSTYPE:-}" in darwin*) command -v say >/dev/null && command -v ffmpeg >/dev/null && command -v afplay >/dev/null ;; linux*) { command -v ffmpeg >/dev/null || command -v arecord >/dev/null; } && command -v aplay >/dev/null ;; *) echo 'unsupported host: microphone/playback preflight supports macOS and Linux' >&2; exit 1 ;; esac && echo ok
